name: excalidraw_local
description: Local MCP server for streaming Excalidraw diagrams with interactive editing.
long_description: A local MCP App server built from the pnpm build output of excalidraw-mcp. It renders Excalidraw diagrams with hand-drawn SVG streaming animations, fullscreen editing, checkpoint restore, and export support.

tools.name: read_me
tools.description: Returns the Excalidraw element format reference with color palettes, examples, and tips. Call this before using create_view.

tools.name: create_view
tools.description: Renders a hand-drawn diagram using Excalidraw elements with streaming draw-on animations.
